case_title: KARINA RODRIGUEZ JIMENEZ VS. ESSENCIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, KARINA RODRIGUEZ AS TO DEFENDANT ESSENCIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, KARINA RODRIGUEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESSENCIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $2,333.44 PRINCIPAL, $13.13 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,571.57, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
